## Getting Started

```bash
# 1. Create development branch
git checkout -b feature/phase[N]-[name]

# 2. Review the detailed task plan
cat docs/phases/phase[N]/PHASE[N]_TASKS.md

# 3. Start with Task 1
# Follow sub-steps in the task document
```
